products.name: BMW Smart Key — F/G Chassis BCP (White M-Stripe)
products.description: Aftermarket BMW BDC2 / BDC3 / BCP smart key. White shell with M-Sport stripe. 315MHz / 433MHz available. Programming via CGDI K2.

products.name: BMW Smart Key — F-Chassis 4-Button
products.description: BMW F-chassis 4-button smart key (lock / unlock / trunk / panic). Silver shell. Includes shell + PCB.

products.name: BMW Smart Key — F-Chassis 3-Button (with PCB)
products.description: BMW F-chassis 3-button smart key. Black shell, original-style PCB. Programming available.

products.name: BMW Smart Key — G-Chassis 4-Button (NCF795xV / ID49)
products.description: BMW G-chassis 4-button smart key. NCF795xV / ID49 chip. 434MHz. FCC ID: N5F-ID21A.

products.name: BMW BCP Original PCB — 315MHz UWB
products.description: Original BMW BCP PCB only. 315MHz with UWB support. CA = UWB. For shell-swap or repair.

products.name: BMW BCP Original PCB — 433.92MHz UWB
products.description: Original BMW BCP PCB only. 433.92MHz with UWB support. CA = UWB. European/EU spec.

products.name: Audi Smart Key — KEYDIY FGB08 Model A (2-Button)
products.description: KEYDIY FGB08 Model A — 2-button universal Audi smart key. Works with KD-X4 / KD-MAX. Soldering adapter compatible.

products.name: Audi Smart Key — KEYDIY FGB08 Model B (3-Button)
products.description: KEYDIY FGB08 Model B — 3-button Audi smart key. Plain shell. Works with KD-X4 / KD-MAX.

products.name: Audi Smart Key — KEYDIY FGB08 Model C (3-Button)
products.description: KEYDIY FGB08 Model C — 3-button Audi smart key (lock / trunk / unlock). Works with KD-X4 / KD-MAX.

products.name: Audi Smart Key — KEYDIY FGB08 Model D (3-Button 2x)
products.description: KEYDIY FGB08 Model D — 3-button Audi smart key with 2x button. Slim profile. Works with KD-X4 / KD-MAX.

products.name: Audi XSMA8YEN Smart Key (PCB + Shell)
products.description: Xhorse XSMA8YEN universal Audi smart key. Includes PCB + shell. 3-button with 2x layout.

products.name: VW Smart Key — KEYDIY FGB25-5 (5-Button)
products.description: KEYDIY FGB25-5 — 5-button VW smart key. Lock / unlock / trunk / 2x / panic. KD 5D program supported.

products.name: VW Smart Key — KEYDIY FGB25-5 Model A (2-Button)
products.description: KEYDIY FGB25-5 Model A — 2-button VW smart key. Black gloss shell. Works with KD-X4 / KD-MAX.

products.name: VW FGB25-5 PCB Only
products.description: KEYDIY FGB25-5 PCB only. For shell swaps or repair work. KD 5D program compatible.

products.name: Honda Smart Key Set — Multi-Button (KR5TP-4)
products.description: Honda smart key collection. Multiple button configurations available (3 / 4 / 5 / 6 button). FCC ID: KR5TP-4. Specify model + year when ordering.

products.name: Lexus Smart Key Set — Multi-Button
products.description: Lexus aftermarket smart key collection. 3 / 4 button options. Multiple Lexus models supported. Specify year + model.

products.name: Lexus Key Shell Set (HYQ14FBA)
products.description: Lexus key shell — HYQ14FBA / IC 1551A-14FBA. Multiple button configs available. Shell only (no PCB).

products.name: BMW Metal Chrome Key Case with Carabiner
products.description: Premium chrome metal case for BMW smart keys. Includes BMW logo emblem + carabiner clip. Hard-shell protection.

products.name: BMW M-Performance TPU Case (Red/Black)
products.description: BMW M-Performance themed TPU case. Red and black with M emblem. Lightweight, flexible protection.

products.name: BMW M-Performance TPU Case (Grey/Black)
products.description: BMW M-Performance grey/black TPU case. M emblem accent. Slim profile, key-ring loop included.

products.name: Honda CR-V Leather/Metal Case (Bright Silver)
products.description: Premium Honda CR-V key case. Leather wrap with bright silver metal frame. Includes leather strap and grey buckle.

products.name: Toyota Carbon Fiber Metal Case Set
products.description: Toyota smart key case — full metal package with carbon fiber pattern. Anti-fall and wear-resistant. Toyota logo embossed.

products.name: Toyota Brushed Metal Key Case
products.description: Toyota brushed metal smart key case. Premium finish. Hard-shell protection.

products.name: Dodge SRT/Hellcat Metal Key Case
products.description: Dodge SRT / Hellcat metal key case. Hellcat logo on rear. Fits 5-button Chrysler / Dodge / Jeep FOBIK keys.

products.name: Kia Matte Gun-Grey Metal Key Case
products.description: Kia matte gun-grey metal smart key case. Includes matching leather buckle keychain. KIA logo embossed.

products.name: Kia Matte Black Metal Key Case
products.description: Kia matte black metal smart key case. KIA logo embossed. Premium feel, anti-fall protection.

products.name: Toyota/Lexus Silicone Honeycomb Cover (Pair)
products.description: Pair of silicone honeycomb covers for Toyota/Lexus smart keys. Black with red accent stripe. Soft-touch grip protection.

products.name: Honda Silicone Honeycomb Cover (Pair)
products.description: Pair of silicone honeycomb covers for Honda smart keys. Black with red accent stripe. Soft-touch grip protection.
